name: Amplitude Studios — [Lead Contact TBD] — Independence + Endless Legend 2
desc:
## Studio Summary
**Website:** https://www.amplitude-studios.com
**Location:** Paris, France
**Size:** ~100 employees
**Focus:** PC/Console Strategy (4X)
**Funding Status:** €12M Series A (May 2025), newly independent from Sega

## Recent Games
- Endless Legend 2 (Early Access Sept 2025)
- Endless Space series
- Humankind
- Endless Dungeon

## Key Contacts
- TBD (Research LinkedIn leadership)

## Growth Signals
- €12M Series A led by Griffin Gaming Partners (May 2025)
- Independence from Sega (Nov 2024)
- Early Access launch for Endless Legend 2

## Outreach Angle
Fresh independence + major funding = budget for partnerships. PC strategy specialist with live ops content pipeline.

## Source
Hollywood Reporter, GamesIndustry.biz (May 2025)

name: Toys for Bob — Paul Yan/Avery Lodato — Independent + Xbox Partnership
desc:
## Studio Summary
**Website:** https://www.toysforbob.com
**Location:** Novato, California, USA
**Size:** ~50-100 employees
**Focus:** PC/Console (AAA Indie)
**Funding Status:** Xbox development deal (2024), newly independent

## Recent Games
- Crash Bandicoot 4: It's About Time
- Spyro Reignited Trilogy
- Skylanders series

## Key Contacts
- Paul Yan (Co-Studio Head)
- Avery Lodato (Co-Studio Head)

## Growth Signals
- Independent since May 2024 (spun from Activision/Microsoft)
- Signed development deal with Xbox for first indie title
- Veteran AAA console team

## Outreach Angle
Recently independent with Xbox backing = flexibility + budget. Proven console experience. Looking to establish new partnerships as indie.

## Source
GamesIndustry.biz, IGN, Variety (March-June 2024)
